client.c(3) Library Functions Manual client.c(3)

NAME

client.c

SYNOPSIS

Macros


#define WASM_LOG_USE_ERROR

Enumerations


enum connection_state_t { CONNECTION_STATE_DISCONNECTED = 0, CONNECTION_STATE_CONNECTING = 1, CONNECTION_STATE_HANDSHAKE = 2, CONNECTION_STATE_CONNECTED = 3, CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR = 4 }

Functions


EM_JS (void, js_send_raw_packet,(const uint8_t *packet_data, size_t packet_len), { if(!Module.sendPacketCallback) { console.error('[WASM] sendPacketCallback not registered - cannot send packet');return;} const packetArray=new Uint8Array(HEAPU8.buffer, packet_data, packet_len);const packetCopy=new Uint8Array(packetArray);var pktType=packetCopy.length >=10 ?((packetCopy[8]<< 8)|packetCopy[9]) :-1;console.error('[WASM->JS] Sending raw packet:', packetCopy.length, 'bytes, type=0x'+pktType.toString(16));Module.sendPacketCallback(packetCopy);})
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_init_with_args (const char *args_json)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE void client_cleanup (void)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_generate_keypair (void)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_set_server_address (const char *server_host, int server_port)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE char * client_get_public_key_hex (void)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_handle_key_exchange_init (const uint8_t *packet, size_t packet_len)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_handle_auth_challenge (const uint8_t *packet, size_t packet_len)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_handle_handshake_complete (const uint8_t *packet, size_t packet_len)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_encrypt_packet (const uint8_t *plaintext, size_t plaintext_len, uint8_t *ciphertext, size_t ciphertext_size, size_t *out_len)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_decrypt_packet (const uint8_t *ciphertext, size_t ciphertext_len, uint8_t *plaintext, size_t plaintext_size, size_t *out_len)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE char * client_parse_packet (const uint8_t *raw_packet, size_t packet_len)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_serialize_packet (uint16_t packet_type, const uint8_t *payload, size_t payload_len, uint32_t client_id, uint8_t *output, size_t *out_len)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_send_video_frame (const uint8_t *rgba_data, int width, int height)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_get_connection_state (void)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE void client_free_string (char *ptr)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_opus_encoder_init (int sample_rate, int channels, int bitrate)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_opus_decoder_init (int sample_rate, int channels)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_opus_encode (const int16_t *pcm_data, int frame_size, uint8_t *opus_data, int max_opus_bytes)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE int client_opus_decode (const uint8_t *opus_data, int opus_bytes, int16_t *pcm_data, int frame_size, int decode_fec)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE void client_opus_encoder_cleanup (void)
EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE void client_opus_decoder_cleanup (void)

121              {
122   CONNECTION_STATE_DISCONNECTED = 0,
123   CONNECTION_STATE_CONNECTING = 1,
124   CONNECTION_STATE_HANDSHAKE = 2,

EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  void client_cleanup (void )


Definition at line 199 of file src/web/client.c.


199                           {
200   WASM_LOG("=== client_cleanup CALLED ===");
201   WASM_LOG_INT("  g_initialized", g_initialized);
202   WASM_LOG_INT("  g_connection_state", g_connection_state);
203   WASM_LOG_INT("  g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state", g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state);
204 
205   // Clean up crypto handshake context
206   crypto_handshake_destroy(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx);
207   memset(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx, 0, sizeof(g_crypto_handshake_ctx));
208 
209   g_handshake_complete = false;
210   g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_DISCONNECTED;
211   g_initialized = false;
212   options_state_destroy();
213   platform_destroy();
214 
215   WASM_LOG("=== client_cleanup COMPLETE ===");
216 }






References CONNECTION_STATE_DISCONNECTED,
    crypto_handshake_destroy(), options_state_destroy(),
    platform_destroy(), WASM_LOG, and WASM_LOG_INT.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_decrypt_packet (const uint8_t * ciphertext, size_t
  ciphertext_len, uint8_t * plaintext, size_t plaintext_size, size_t *
  out_len)


Decrypt a ciphertext packet


Parameters


ciphertext Input ciphertext data


ciphertext_len Length of ciphertext


plaintext Output buffer (allocated by caller, must be at least
  ciphertext_len)


plaintext_size Size of plaintext buffer


out_len Output parameter for plaintext length


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 579 of file src/web/client.c.


580                                            {
581   if (!g_handshake_complete) {
582     WASM_ERROR("Decryption requires completed handshake");
583     return -1;
584   }
585 
586   // Decrypt the packet using handshake context's crypto context
587   size_t plaintext_len = 0;
588   crypto_result_t result = crypto_decrypt(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx.crypto_ctx, ciphertext, ciphertext_len, plaintext,
589                                           plaintext_size, &plaintext_len);
590   if (result != CRYPTO_OK) {
591     WASM_ERROR("Decryption failed");
592     return -1;
593   }
594 
595   *out_len = plaintext_len;
596   return 0;
597 }






References crypto_decrypt(), CRYPTO_OK, and
    WASM_ERROR.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_encrypt_packet (const uint8_t * plaintext, size_t
  plaintext_len, uint8_t * ciphertext, size_t ciphertext_size, size_t *
  out_len)


Encrypt a plaintext packet


Parameters


plaintext Input plaintext data


plaintext_len Length of plaintext


ciphertext Output buffer (allocated by caller, must be at least
  plaintext_len + crypto_aead_overhead)


ciphertext_size Size of ciphertext buffer


out_len Output parameter for ciphertext length


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 549 of file src/web/client.c.


550                                            {
551   if (!g_handshake_complete) {
552     WASM_ERROR("Encryption requires completed handshake");
553     return -1;
554   }
555 
556   // Encrypt the packet using handshake context's crypto context
557   size_t ciphertext_len = 0;
558   crypto_result_t result = crypto_encrypt(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx.crypto_ctx, plaintext, plaintext_len, ciphertext,
559                                           ciphertext_size, &ciphertext_len);
560   if (result != CRYPTO_OK) {
561     WASM_ERROR("Encryption failed");
562     return -1;
563   }
564 
565   *out_len = ciphertext_len;
566   return 0;
567 }






References crypto_encrypt(), CRYPTO_OK, and
    WASM_ERROR.

EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_generate_keypair (void )


Generate client keypair for handshake


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 227 of file src/web/client.c.


227                                   {
228   WASM_LOG("=== client_generate_keypair CALLED ===");
229   WASM_LOG_INT("  g_initialized", g_initialized);
230   WASM_LOG_INT("  g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state BEFORE", g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state);
231 
232   if (!g_initialized) {
233     WASM_ERROR("Client not initialized");
234     return -1;
235   }
236 
237   // Reset handshake context if previously used (reconnection / React Strict Mode remount)
238   if (g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state != CRYPTO_HANDSHAKE_DISABLED) {
239     WASM_LOG("Destroying previous handshake context before re-init");
240     WASM_LOG_INT("  State before destroy", g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state);
241     crypto_handshake_destroy(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx);
242     WASM_LOG_INT("  State after destroy", g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state);
243     memset(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx, 0, sizeof(g_crypto_handshake_ctx));
244     WASM_LOG_INT("  State after memset", g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state);
245     g_handshake_complete = false;
246   }
247 
248   // Initialize crypto handshake context
249   WASM_LOG("Calling crypto_handshake_init...");
250   WASM_LOG_INT("  State before init", g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state);
251   asciichat_error_t result = crypto_handshake_init("wasm-client", &g_crypto_handshake_ctx, false /* is_server */);
252   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
253     WASM_LOG_INT("crypto_handshake_init FAILED, result", result);
254     WASM_LOG_INT("  State after failed init", g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state);
255     return -1;
256   }
257 
258   WASM_LOG("Keypair generated successfully");
259   WASM_LOG_INT("  g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state AFTER init", g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state);
260   g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_DISCONNECTED;
261   return 0;
262 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK,
    CONNECTION_STATE_DISCONNECTED, crypto_handshake_destroy(),
    CRYPTO_HANDSHAKE_DISABLED, crypto_handshake_init(),
    WASM_ERROR, WASM_LOG, and WASM_LOG_INT.

  int client_get_connection_state (void )


Get current connection state


Returns

EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  char * client_get_public_key_hex (void )


Get client public key as hex string


Returns


Allocated hex string (caller must free with
  client_free_string), or NULL on error


Definition at line 295 of file src/web/client.c.


295                                       {
296   if (g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state == CRYPTO_HANDSHAKE_DISABLED) {
297     WASM_ERROR("No crypto context (call client_generate_keypair first)");
298     return NULL;
299   }
300 
301   // Get public key from handshake context
302   const uint8_t *pubkey = g_crypto_handshake_ctx.crypto_ctx.public_key;
303   if (!pubkey) {
304     WASM_ERROR("Public key not available in crypto context");
305     return NULL;
306   }
307 
308   // Allocate buffer for hex string (32 bytes = 64 hex chars + null terminator)
309   char *hex_buffer = SAFE_MALLOC(65, char *);
310   if (!hex_buffer) {
311     WASM_ERROR("Failed to allocate hex buffer");
312     return NULL;
313   }
314 
315   // Convert public key to hex
316   for (int i = 0; i < 32; i++) {
317     snprintf(hex_buffer + (i * 2), 3, "%02x", pubkey[i]);
318   }
319   hex_buffer[64] = '\0';
320 
321   return hex_buffer;
322 }






References CRYPTO_HANDSHAKE_DISABLED, SAFE_MALLOC,
    and WASM_ERROR.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_handle_auth_challenge (const uint8_t * packet, size_t
  packet_len)


Handle CRYPTO_AUTH_CHALLENGE packet from server


Parameters


packet Raw packet data including header


packet_len Total packet length


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 419 of file src/web/client.c.


419                                                                            {
420   WASM_LOG("=== client_handle_auth_challenge CALLED ===");
421   WASM_LOG_INT("  packet_len", (int)packet_len);
422   WASM_LOG_INT("  g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state", g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state);
423 
424   if (!packet || packet_len == 0) {
425     WASM_ERROR("Invalid packet data");
426     return -1;
427   }
428 
429   // Extract packet type and payload
430   if (packet_len < sizeof(packet_header_t)) {
431     WASM_ERROR("Packet too small for header");
432     return -1;
433   }
434 
435   const packet_header_t *header = (const packet_header_t *)packet;
436   packet_type_t packet_type = ntohs(header->type);
437   const uint8_t *payload_src = packet + sizeof(packet_header_t);
438   size_t payload_len = packet_len - sizeof(packet_header_t);
439 
440   WASM_LOG_INT("  packet_type", packet_type);
441   WASM_LOG_INT("  payload_len", (int)payload_len);
442 
443   // Allocate payload copy from buffer pool (crypto function takes ownership and frees it)
444   uint8_t *payload = NULL;
445   if (payload_len > 0) {
446     payload = buffer_pool_alloc(NULL, payload_len);
447     if (!payload) {
448       WASM_ERROR("Failed to allocate payload buffer");
449       g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR;
450       return -1;
451     }
452     memcpy(payload, payload_src, payload_len);
453   }
454 
455   // Process auth challenge
456   asciichat_error_t result = crypto_handshake_client_auth_response(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx, &g_wasm_transport,
457                                                                    packet_type, payload, payload_len);
458 
459   WASM_LOG_INT("  auth_response result", result);
460 
461   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
462     WASM_ERROR("Failed to process AUTH_CHALLENGE");
463     g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR;
464     return -1;
465   }
466 
467   WASM_LOG("=== AUTH_CHALLENGE processed successfully ===");
468   return 0;
469 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, buffer_pool_alloc(),
    CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR,
    crypto_handshake_client_auth_response(),
    packet_header_t::type, WASM_ERROR, WASM_LOG, and
    WASM_LOG_INT.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_handle_handshake_complete (const uint8_t * packet, size_t
  packet_len)


Handle CRYPTO_HANDSHAKE_COMPLETE packet from server


Parameters


packet Raw packet data including header


packet_len Total packet length


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 478 of file src/web/client.c.


478                                                                                {
479   WASM_LOG("=== client_handle_handshake_complete CALLED ===");
480   WASM_LOG_INT("  packet_len", (int)packet_len);
481   WASM_LOG_INT("  g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state", g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state);
482 
483   if (!packet || packet_len == 0) {
484     WASM_ERROR("Invalid packet data");
485     return -1;
486   }
487 
488   // Extract packet type and payload
489   if (packet_len < sizeof(packet_header_t)) {
490     WASM_ERROR("Packet too small for header");
491     return -1;
492   }
493 
494   const packet_header_t *header = (const packet_header_t *)packet;
495   packet_type_t packet_type = ntohs(header->type);
496   const uint8_t *payload_src = packet + sizeof(packet_header_t);
497   size_t payload_len = packet_len - sizeof(packet_header_t);
498 
499   WASM_LOG_INT("  packet_type", packet_type);
500 
501   // Allocate payload copy from buffer pool (crypto function takes ownership and frees it)
502   uint8_t *payload = NULL;
503   if (payload_len > 0) {
504     payload = buffer_pool_alloc(NULL, payload_len);
505     if (!payload) {
506       WASM_ERROR("Failed to allocate payload buffer");
507       g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR;
508       return -1;
509     }
510     memcpy(payload, payload_src, payload_len);
511   }
512 
513   // Complete handshake (takes ownership of payload and will free it)
514   asciichat_error_t result =
515       crypto_handshake_client_complete(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx, &g_wasm_transport, packet_type, payload, payload_len);
516 
517   WASM_LOG_INT("  handshake_complete result", result);
518 
519   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
520     WASM_ERROR("Failed to complete handshake");
521     g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR;
522     return -1;
523   }
524 
525   g_handshake_complete = true;
526   g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_CONNECTED;
527 
528   // Update transport with the crypto context so ACIP can encrypt/decrypt packets
529   g_wasm_transport.crypto_ctx = &g_crypto_handshake_ctx.crypto_ctx;
530 
531   WASM_LOG("=== HANDSHAKE COMPLETE - session encrypted ===");
532   return 0;
533 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, buffer_pool_alloc(),
    CONNECTION_STATE_CONNECTED, CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR,
    crypto_handshake_client_complete(), packet_header_t::type,
    WASM_ERROR, WASM_LOG, and WASM_LOG_INT.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_handle_key_exchange_init (const uint8_t * packet, size_t
  packet_len)


Handle CRYPTO_KEY_EXCHANGE_INIT packet from server This is the
    first step of the crypto handshake


Parameters


packet Raw packet data including header


packet_len Total packet length


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 332 of file src/web/client.c.


332                                                                               {
333   WASM_LOG("=== client_handle_key_exchange_init CALLED ===");
334   WASM_LOG_INT("  packet_len", (int)packet_len);
335   WASM_LOG_INT("  g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state BEFORE", g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state);
336 
337   // Safety check: if handshake context is not in INIT state, reinitialize it
338   // This handles cases where previous handshakes weren't properly cleaned up
339   if (g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state != CRYPTO_HANDSHAKE_INIT) {
340     WASM_LOG("Handshake context not in INIT state, reinitializing...");
341     WASM_LOG_INT("  Previous state", g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state);
342 
343     // Destroy and reset
344     if (g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state != CRYPTO_HANDSHAKE_DISABLED) {
345       crypto_handshake_destroy(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx);
346     }
347     memset(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx, 0, sizeof(g_crypto_handshake_ctx));
348 
349     // Reinitialize to INIT state
350     asciichat_error_t init_result = crypto_handshake_init("wasm-client", &g_crypto_handshake_ctx, false);
351     if (init_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
352       WASM_ERROR("Failed to reinitialize crypto handshake context");
353       WASM_LOG_INT("  init result", init_result);
354       return -1;
355     }
356     WASM_LOG("Crypto handshake context reinitialized");
357   }
358 
359   if (!packet || packet_len == 0) {
360     WASM_ERROR("Invalid packet data");
361     return -1;
362   }
363 
364   // Extract packet type and payload
365   if (packet_len < sizeof(packet_header_t)) {
366     WASM_ERROR("Packet too small for header");
367     return -1;
368   }
369 
370   const packet_header_t *header = (const packet_header_t *)packet;
371   packet_type_t packet_type = ntohs(header->type);
372   const uint8_t *payload_src = packet + sizeof(packet_header_t);
373   size_t payload_len = packet_len - sizeof(packet_header_t);
374 
375   WASM_LOG_INT("  packet_type", packet_type);
376   WASM_LOG_INT("  payload_len", (int)payload_len);
377 
378   // Allocate payload copy from buffer pool (crypto function takes ownership and frees it)
379   // The raw packet pointer from JS cannot be passed directly because the crypto
380   // handshake function calls buffer_pool_free() on the payload when done.
381   uint8_t *payload = NULL;
382   if (payload_len > 0) {
383     payload = buffer_pool_alloc(NULL, payload_len);
384     if (!payload) {
385       WASM_ERROR("Failed to allocate payload buffer");
386       g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR;
387       return -1;
388     }
389     memcpy(payload, payload_src, payload_len);
390   }
391 
392   // Process key exchange using transport-abstracted handshake
393   WASM_LOG("Calling crypto_handshake_client_key_exchange...");
394 
395   asciichat_error_t result = crypto_handshake_client_key_exchange(&g_crypto_handshake_ctx, &g_wasm_transport,
396                                                                   packet_type, payload, payload_len);
397 
398   WASM_LOG_INT("  handshake result", result);
399   WASM_LOG_INT("  g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state AFTER", g_crypto_handshake_ctx.state);
400 
401   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
402     WASM_ERROR("Failed to process KEY_EXCHANGE_INIT");
403     g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR;
404     return -1;
405   }
406 
407   g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_HANDSHAKE;
408   WASM_LOG("=== KEY_EXCHANGE_INIT processed successfully ===");
409   return 0;
410 }






References ASCIICHAT_OK, buffer_pool_alloc(),
    CONNECTION_STATE_ERROR, CONNECTION_STATE_HANDSHAKE,
    crypto_handshake_client_key_exchange(),
    crypto_handshake_destroy(), CRYPTO_HANDSHAKE_DISABLED,
    CRYPTO_HANDSHAKE_INIT, crypto_handshake_init(),
    packet_header_t::type, WASM_ERROR, WASM_LOG, and
    WASM_LOG_INT.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_init_with_args (const char * args_json)


Initialize client mode with command-line style arguments


Parameters


args_json Space-separated string of argument
  strings, e.g. "client --width 80 --height 40"


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 141 of file src/web/client.c.


141                                                  {
142   WASM_LOG("client_init_with_args: START");
143 
144   // Parse space-separated arguments
145   WASM_LOG("Parsing arguments...");
146   char *args_copy = NULL;
147   char *argv[64] = {NULL};
148   int argc = wasm_parse_args(args_json, argv, 64, &args_copy);
149   if (argc < 0) {
150     WASM_ERROR("strdup FAILED");
151     return -1;
152   }
153   WASM_LOG_INT("Parsed arguments, argc", argc);
154 
155   // Initialize options (sets up RCU, defaults, etc.)
156   WASM_LOG("Calling options_init...");
157   asciichat_error_t err = options_init(argc, argv);
158   free(args_copy);
159 
160   if (g_initialized) {
161     WASM_ERROR("Client already initialized");
162     return -1;
163   }
164 
165   // Initialize platform layer
166   WASM_LOG("Calling platform_init...");
167   err = platform_init();
168   if (err != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
169     WASM_ERROR("platform_init FAILED");
170     return -1;
171   }
172   WASM_LOG("platform_init OK");
173 
174   // Initialize logging to stderr (console.error in browser)
175   WASM_LOG("Calling log_init...");
176   log_init(NULL, LOG_DEBUG, true, false);
177   WASM_LOG("log_init OK");
178   log_info("WASM client initialized via logging system");
179 
180   if (err != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
181     WASM_LOG_INT("options_init FAILED", err);
182     return -1;
183   }
184   WASM_LOG("options_init OK");
185 
186   // Initialize ANSI color code generation
187   WASM_LOG("Calling ansi_fast_init...");
188   ansi_fast_init();
189   WASM_LOG("ansi_fast_init OK");
190 
191   g_initialized = true;
192   g_connection_state = CONNECTION_STATE_DISCONNECTED;
193 
194   WASM_LOG("client_init_with_args: COMPLETE");
195   return 0;
196 }






References ansi_fast_init(), ASCIICHAT_OK,
    CONNECTION_STATE_DISCONNECTED, LOG_DEBUG, log_info,
    log_init(), options_init(), platform_init(),
    WASM_ERROR, WASM_LOG, WASM_LOG_INT, and
    wasm_parse_args().






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_opus_decode (const uint8_t * opus_data, int opus_bytes,
  int16_t * pcm_data, int frame_size, int decode_fec)


Decode Opus audio to PCM


Parameters


opus_data Input Opus data


opus_bytes Length of Opus data


pcm_data Output buffer for PCM samples (Int16)


frame_size Maximum number of samples per channel


decode_fec Whether to use FEC


Returns


Number of samples decoded per channel, or -1 on
  error


Definition at line 816 of file src/web/client.c.


816                                                                                                                     {
817   if (!g_opus_decoder) {
818     WASM_ERROR("Opus decoder not initialized");
819     return -1;
820   }
821 
822   int decoded_samples = opus_decode(g_opus_decoder, opus_data, opus_bytes, pcm_data, frame_size, decode_fec);
823   if (decoded_samples < 0) {
824     WASM_ERROR("Opus decoding failed");
825     return -1;
826   }
827 
828   return decoded_samples;
829 }






References WASM_ERROR.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  void client_opus_decoder_cleanup (void )


Cleanup Opus decoder


Definition at line 847 of file src/web/client.c.


847                                        {
848   if (g_opus_decoder) {
849     opus_decoder_destroy(g_opus_decoder);
850     g_opus_decoder = NULL;
851     WASM_LOG("Opus decoder cleaned up");
852   }
853 }






References WASM_LOG.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_opus_decoder_init (int sample_rate, int channels)


Initialize Opus decoder


Parameters


sample_rate Sample rate (8000, 16000, 24000, or
  48000)


channels Number of channels (1=mono, 2=stereo)


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 765 of file src/web/client.c.


765                                                             {
766   if (g_opus_decoder) {
767     opus_decoder_destroy(g_opus_decoder);
768     g_opus_decoder = NULL;
769   }
770 
771   int error;
772   g_opus_decoder = opus_decoder_create(sample_rate, channels, &error);
773   if (error != OPUS_OK || !g_opus_decoder) {
774     WASM_ERROR("Failed to create Opus decoder");
775     return -1;
776   }
777 
778   WASM_LOG("Opus decoder initialized");
779   return 0;
780 }






References WASM_ERROR, and WASM_LOG.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_opus_encode (const int16_t * pcm_data, int frame_size,
  uint8_t * opus_data, int max_opus_bytes)


Encode PCM audio to Opus


Parameters


pcm_data Input PCM data (Int16 samples)


frame_size Number of samples per channel


opus_data Output buffer for Opus data


max_opus_bytes Maximum size of output buffer


Returns


Number of bytes encoded, or -1 on error


Definition at line 791 of file src/web/client.c.


791                                                                                                         {
792   if (!g_opus_encoder) {
793     WASM_ERROR("Opus encoder not initialized");
794     return -1;
795   }
796 
797   int encoded_bytes = opus_encode(g_opus_encoder, pcm_data, frame_size, opus_data, max_opus_bytes);
798   if (encoded_bytes < 0) {
799     WASM_ERROR("Opus encoding failed");
800     return -1;
801   }
802 
803   return encoded_bytes;
804 }

EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_opus_encoder_init (int sample_rate, int channels, int
  bitrate)


Initialize Opus encoder


Parameters


sample_rate Sample rate (8000, 16000, 24000, or
  48000)


channels Number of channels (1=mono, 2=stereo)


bitrate Target bitrate in bits/sec


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 738 of file src/web/client.c.


738                                                                          {
739   if (g_opus_encoder) {
740     opus_encoder_destroy(g_opus_encoder);
741     g_opus_encoder = NULL;
742   }
743 
744   int error;
745   g_opus_encoder = opus_encoder_create(sample_rate, channels, OPUS_APPLICATION_VOIP, &error);
746   if (error != OPUS_OK || !g_opus_encoder) {
747     WASM_ERROR("Failed to create Opus encoder");
748     return -1;
749   }
750 
751   // Set bitrate
752   opus_encoder_ctl(g_opus_encoder, OPUS_SET_BITRATE(bitrate));
753 
754   WASM_LOG("Opus encoder initialized");
755   return 0;
756 }






References OPUS_APPLICATION_VOIP, WASM_ERROR, and
    WASM_LOG.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  char * client_parse_packet (const uint8_t * raw_packet, size_t
  packet_len)


Parse a raw packet and return JSON metadata


Parameters


raw_packet Raw packet bytes including header


packet_len Length of raw packet


Returns


Allocated JSON string with packet metadata (caller must
  free), or NULL on error


Definition at line 606 of file src/web/client.c.


606                                                                         {
607   if (!raw_packet || packet_len < sizeof(packet_header_t)) {
608     WASM_ERROR("Invalid packet data");
609     return NULL;
610   }
611 
612   // Parse packet header directly from bytes
613   const packet_header_t *header = (const packet_header_t *)raw_packet;
614 
615   // Validate magic number (convert from network byte order)
616   uint64_t magic = NET_TO_HOST_U64(header->magic);
617   if (magic != PACKET_MAGIC) {
618     WASM_ERROR("Invalid packet magic number");
619     return NULL;
620   }
621 
622   // Convert header fields from network byte order
623   uint16_t type = NET_TO_HOST_U16(header->type);
624   uint32_t length = NET_TO_HOST_U32(header->length);
625   uint32_t client_id = NET_TO_HOST_U32(header->client_id);
626   uint32_t crc32 = NET_TO_HOST_U32(header->crc32);
627 
628   // Build JSON response with packet metadata
629   char *json = SAFE_MALLOC(1024, char *);
630   if (!json) {
631     WASM_ERROR("Failed to allocate JSON buffer");
632     return NULL;
633   }
634 
635   snprintf(json, 1024, "{\"type\":%u,\"length\":%u,\"client_id\":%u,\"crc32\":%u}", type, length, client_id, crc32);
636 
637   return json;
638 }






References packet_header_t::client_id,
    packet_header_t::crc32, packet_header_t::length,
    packet_header_t::magic, NET_TO_HOST_U16,
    NET_TO_HOST_U32, NET_TO_HOST_U64, PACKET_MAGIC,
    SAFE_MALLOC, packet_header_t::type, and WASM_ERROR.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_send_video_frame (const uint8_t * rgba_data, int width, int
  height)


Process a video frame and prepare it for sending


Parameters


rgba_data RGBA pixel data from canvas


width Frame width


height Frame height


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 688 of file src/web/client.c.


688                                                                              {
689   if (!g_initialized) {
690     WASM_ERROR("Client not initialized");
691     return -1;
692   }
693 
694   // This is a placeholder - actual implementation would:
695   // 1. Convert RGBA to target format (e.g., compress with libjpeg-turbo)
696   // 2. Build frame packet
697   // 3. Encrypt if handshake complete
698   // 4. Return serialized packet via callback to JS
699 
700   WASM_LOG("Video frame processing not yet implemented");
701   return 0;
702 }






References WASM_ERROR, and WASM_LOG.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_serialize_packet (uint16_t packet_type, const uint8_t
  * payload, size_t payload_len, uint32_t client_id, uint8_t *
  output, size_t * out_len)


Serialize a packet structure to raw bytes


Parameters


packet_type Type of packet


payload Packet payload data


payload_len Length of payload


client_id Client ID to include in header


output Output buffer (allocated by caller)


out_len Output parameter for total packet length


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 651 of file src/web/client.c.


652                                                               {
653   if (!output || !out_len) {
654     WASM_ERROR("Invalid output parameters");
655     return -1;
656   }
657 
658   // Calculate CRC32 of payload (use software version for WASM)
659   uint32_t crc = payload && payload_len > 0 ? asciichat_crc32_sw(payload, payload_len) : 0;
660 
661   // Build packet header (convert to network byte order)
662   packet_header_t header = {.magic = HOST_TO_NET_U64(PACKET_MAGIC),
663                             .type = HOST_TO_NET_U16(packet_type),
664                             .length = HOST_TO_NET_U32((uint32_t)payload_len),
665                             .crc32 = HOST_TO_NET_U32(crc),
666                             .client_id = HOST_TO_NET_U32(client_id)};
667 
668   // Copy header to output
669   memcpy(output, &header, sizeof(packet_header_t));
670 
671   // Copy payload to output
672   if (payload && payload_len > 0) {
673     memcpy(output + sizeof(packet_header_t), payload, payload_len);
674   }
675 
676   *out_len = sizeof(packet_header_t) + payload_len;
677   return 0;
678 }






References asciichat_crc32_sw(), HOST_TO_NET_U16,
    HOST_TO_NET_U32, HOST_TO_NET_U64, PACKET_MAGIC, and
    WASM_ERROR.






EMSCRIPTEN_KEEPALIVE
  int client_set_server_address (const char * server_host, int
  server_port)


Set server address for known_hosts verification


Parameters


server_host Server hostname or IP address


server_port Server port number


Returns


0 on success, -1 on error


Definition at line 271 of file src/web/client.c.


271                                                                         {
272   if (!g_initialized) {
273     WASM_ERROR("Client not initialized");
274     return -1;
275   }
276 
277   if (!server_host || server_port <= 0 || server_port > 65535) {
278     WASM_ERROR("Invalid server address parameters");
279     return -1;
280   }
281 
282   // Set server IP and port in handshake context
283   SAFE_STRNCPY(g_crypto_handshake_ctx.server_ip, server_host, sizeof(g_crypto_handshake_ctx.server_ip));
284   g_crypto_handshake_ctx.server_port = server_port;
285 
286   WASM_LOG("Server address set");
287   return 0;
288 }






References SAFE_STRNCPY, WASM_ERROR, and
    WASM_LOG.






EM_JS
  (void , js_send_raw_packet , (const uint8_t *packet_data, size_t
  packet_len) , { if(!Module.sendPacketCallback) { console.error('[WASM]
  sendPacketCallback not registered - cannot send packet');return;} const
  packetArray=new Uint8Array(HEAPU8.buffer, packet_data, packet_len);const
  packetCopy=new Uint8Array(packetArray);var pktType=packetCopy.length >=10
  ?((packetCopy[8]<< 8)|packetCopy[9]) :-1;console.error('[WASM->JS]
  Sending raw packet:', packetCopy.length, 'bytes,
  type=0x'+pktType.toString(16));Module.sendPacketCallback(packetCopy);}
  )








Author


Zachary Fogg <me@zfo.gg>







  

    Version 0.9.4
    ascii-chat
